Operation 'getCurrentUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Get user info' is too generic. Description only mentions username but doesn't clarify what user information is returned. Enhanced to specify authentication requirement and indicate that user profile details are returned, improving AI agent understanding of the operation's scope and return value.

data.current_description: Retrieve the username associated with the API key.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the user information associated with the provided API key. Returns the authenticated user's profile details including username and account information. Requires valid API key authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get user info' is too generic. Description only mentions username but doesn't clarify what user information is returned. Enhanced to specify authentication requirement and indicate that user profile details are returned, improving AI agent understanding of the operation's scope and return value.

message: Operation 'getTaskStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original descriptions are too vague and don't explain what status information is returned or the context for task monitoring. Enhanced to clarify that this tracks asynchronous operations, specify return value details, and help AI agents understand when to use this operation (e.g., polling for presentation generation completion).

data.current_description: Obtain the status of a specified task.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve task execution status and progress
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the current status and progress of a specified task by task ID. Returns task status information including completion state, progress metrics, and any error details if applicable. Use this to monitor asynchronous presentation generation or document processing tasks.
data.reasoning: Original descriptions are too vague and don't explain what status information is returned or the context for task monitoring. Enhanced to clarify that this tracks asynchronous operations, specify return value details, and help AI agents understand when to use this operation (e.g., polling for presentation generation completion).

message: Operation 'downloadPresentation' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to clarify the temporary nature of the URL, specify that it's used for file download, and indicate the prerequisite of having a presentation ID from generation. This helps AI agents understand the URL's limited lifespan and proper usage context.

data.current_description: Get a short-lived download URL for a presentation by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a short-lived download URL for a generated presentation by its ID. The URL expires after a limited time period and can be used to download the presentation file. Requires the presentation ID from a prior generation request.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to clarify the temporary nature of the URL, specify that it's used for file download, and indicate the prerequisite of having a presentation ID from generation. This helps AI agents understand the URL's limited lifespan and proper usage context.

message: Operation 'getBrandedTemplates' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description is unclear about what 'processed branded templates' means and how they differ from default templates. Enhanced to clarify that these are custom/organization-specific templates and that they've been processed by the system, helping AI agents understand the distinction and when to use this endpoint versus getDefaultTemplates.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all custom branded templates that have been processed and are ready for use. These are user-specific or organization-specific templates that have been uploaded and processed by the system. Returns a list of branded template objects with their configurations.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is unclear about what 'processed branded templates' means and how they differ from default templates. Enhanced to clarify that these are custom/organization-specific templates and that they've been processed by the system, helping AI agents understand the distinction and when to use this endpoint versus getDefaultTemplates.

data.current_description: Upload a document to use it in order to generate a presentation.
data.description_suggestion: Upload a document file to be used as source material for presentation generation. Accepts document files (e.g., PDF, DOCX, TXT) and returns an upload response containing the document ID and metadata. The returned document ID should be used in subsequent presentation generation requests.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks specificity about supported file types, what the upload returns, and how the uploaded document is used downstream. Enhanced to clarify accepted formats, return value details, and the relationship to presentation generation, enabling AI agents to understand the complete workflow.

message: Operation 'generatePresentation' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description lacks critical details about input requirements, return value, and the asynchronous nature of the operation. Enhanced to specify the request schema, clarify that generation is asynchronous with task tracking, and indicate the workflow for retrieving results, enabling AI agents to properly orchestrate the presentation generation process.

data.current_description: Generate a presentation from plain text, documents, or a pre-built outline.
data.description_suggestion: Generate a presentation from multiple source types including plain text content, uploaded documents, or pre-built outlines. Accepts a GeneratePresentationRequest specifying the source material, template selection, and presentation parameters. Returns a task response with a task ID for tracking asynchronous generation progress. Use getTaskStatus to monitor completion and downloadPresentation to retrieve the generated file.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks critical details about input requirements, return value, and the asynchronous nature of the operation. Enhanced to specify the request schema, clarify that generation is asynchronous with task tracking, and indicate the workflow for retrieving results, enabling AI agents to properly orchestrate the presentation generation process.

data.current_description: Generate or edit a presentation outline.
data.description_suggestion: Generates a structured presentation outline from provided content or source material. Accepts content text and optional outline parameters via OutlineRequest. Returns an OutlineResponse containing the generated outline structure. This outline can be used as a foundation for subsequent slide-by-slide generation or full presentation generation.
data.reasoning: Original summary conflates two distinct operations (generate vs edit). Description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and use case. data.current_description: Subscribe to receive a webhook when presentation generation finishes.
data.description_suggestion: Registers a webhook endpoint to receive notifications when presentation generation tasks complete. Accepts WebhookSubscribeRequest containing the webhook URL and optional event filters. Returns a WebhookSubscription object containing the subscription ID and configuration. The webhook will be called with task completion status and results. Subscription persists until explicitly unsubscribed.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description lacks details about request structure, response format, and subscription persistence. Enhanced to specify WebhookSubscribeRequest input, WebhookSubscription response, and clarify that subscriptions persist until removed. Added context about webhook invocation behavior for better AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

data.description_suggestion: Removes an existing webhook subscription by subscription ID. Accepts WebhookUnsubscribeRequest containing the subscription ID to remove. Returns a confirmation response. After removal, no further webhook notifications will be sent for that subscription. The operation is idempotent - removing a non-existent subscription returns success.
